data.title: Nagarro releases audited financial statements and annual report for FY   2025, reaffirms the preliminary numbers
data.description: Nagarro's revenue increased by 2.8% to €999 million, reflecting a constant currency growth of 6.1%. The gross profit also saw a rise of 8.6% to €321 million. The adjusted EBITDA margin stood at 13.8%, falling within the projected range. These results are based on audited figures for the 2025 financial year.

data.title: Scania Performance Summary January - March 2026
data.description: In SÖDERTÄLJE, Sweden, as of April 29, 2026, despite a decrease in sales volumes and rising uncertainty, profitability has remained stable. In the first quarter of 2026, the company saw a decline in sales revenue by 8 percent, amounting to SEK 44.9 billion as compared to SEK 48.9 billion previously. The adjusted return on sales for the quarter stood at 11.0 percent, slightly down from 11.1 percent in the same period. There were changes noted in deliveries, reflecting the challenging business environment.

data.title: Dreame Launches All-in Center Alongside Three New Products, Advancing Fully Automatic Smart Yards
data.description: On April 29 and 30, 2026, Dreame Technology is set to launch its "Dreame NEXT: Autonomous Outdoors" event at the Palace of Fine Arts in San Francisco. The event will showcase three new products, including the All-in-One 2026, with an expected audience of over 500 industry professionals and tech enthusiasts.
The Volvo Cars chief commercial officer said EX60 orders in Europe are strong, with conversions delivering higher margins than comparable plug-in hybrid models

data.title: TotalEnergies Decides the Distribution of a First Interim Dividend of €0.90/Share for Fiscal Year 2026, an Increase of 5.9% Compared to 2025
data.description: Paris - The Board of Directors convened on April 28, 2026, headed by Mr. Patrick Pouyanné, Chairman and CEO. They agreed on a distribution of the first interim dividend amounting to €0.90 per share for the fiscal year 2026. This represents a 5.9% rise from the three interim dividends distributed in fiscal year 2025 and the final ordinary dividend for that year. The interim dividend will be detached and disbursed solely in cash. The timetable for the dividend payment is as follows:

data.title: Global Cosmetics ODM Market Forecast 2026-2036: USA, China & India Drive Growth Led by Cosmax, Intercos & Kolmar Korea | Future Market Insights
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, a recent market analysis conducted by Future Market Insights reveals promising growth prospects for the global cosmetics ODM market. The industry is projected to experience steady expansion due to a rise in outsourcing of product development. There is also an increasing demand for quick product launches. These factors are expected to contribute to the market's growth. The market analysis indicates positive trends with numbers reflecting a significant increase in revenue and market share.

data.title: MagicLab Robotics Unveils Its Embodied AI Vision in Silicon Valley, Expands Global Reach to 50 Countries
data.description: Today in Silicon Valley, on April 29, 2026, MagicLab Robotics, a leading global embodied AI company, held the Global Embodied Intelligence Summit. During the summit, they introduced their latest product lineup, including a new foundational world model. This event was a significant milestone in the company's innovation journey, setting the stage for their future endeavors.

data.title: Seven Extreme Tests, Full‑Scenario Ecosystem: Sungrow Redefines C&I ESS Reliability at GRES
data.description: In Hefei, China, on April 29, 2026, Sungrow made a significant announcement at the 2026 Global Renewable Energy Summit. The company introduced its comprehensive commercial and industrial (C&I) ecosystem, focusing on the innovative PowerKeeper series. This newly launched modular C&I energy storage system is designed to eliminate waste entirely, marking a remarkable advancement in sustainable energy solutions.
Israel’s foreign minister stated that disagreements exist with the United States regarding the issue of regime change in Iran

data.title: EQT makes infrastructure more accessible to individual investors across Europe - introduces new ELTIF evergreen fund
data.description: EQT has introduced the EQT Nexus ELTIF Infrastructure, a new European Long-Term Investment Fund structure for its Nexus Infrastructure evergreen strategy. This launch is set to increase private market access for qualified individuals and institutions within the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA). The EQT Nexus ELTIF Infrastructure is designed to offer investment opportunities in EQT's infrastructure projects, expanding on the firm's commitment to providing diversified investment options.

data.title: HAFNIA LIMITED: Annual General Meeting – Notice
data.description: The 2026 Annual General Meeting of Hafnia Limited is scheduled to take place on Tuesday, May 26, 2026, at 10 Pasir Panjang Road, Mapletree Business City #18-01, Singapore 117438, starting at 09:00 local time. Documents including the Notice of Annual General Meeting, Appendix A, and Form of Proxy are attached for reference. Hafnia Limited is a prominent tanker owner globally, involved in the transportation of oil and oil products.

data.title: PAIDI Technology Debuts at Two Major Global Events of Chery, Empowering New Global Commercial Value with Chinese Innovative Manufacturing
data.description: In April 2026, PAIDI Technology showcased its products at two significant international gatherings organized by Chery Group in WUHU, China. The events attracted participants from around 100 nations and regions, including prominent global merchants. Key markets like Southeast Asia, Europe, and the Americas were extensively represented.
